# sre-reviewer

| | |
|---|---|
| Category | `ops` |
| Type | gate |
| Model | `sonnet` |
| Tools | `Read, Grep, Glob, Bash` |

**Fires when:** reliability/operability review of infra/deploy changes (config-enabled or tagged ops/sre)

Source of truth: [`.claude/agents/ops/sre-reviewer.md`](../../.claude/agents/ops/sre-reviewer.md) · catalog row in [`catalog/agents.tsv`](../../catalog/agents.tsv).

> Read-only review gate — no Write/Edit tools by design. Returns the standard `VERDICT: PASS | FAIL` block.
